source.name: Exploring Eberron
source.author: Keith Baker
source.description:
Dive deeper than ever into the world of Eberron with setting creator Keith Baker!
Exploring Eberron (2024) delves deep into the untold lore of this wondrous world, and it provides a host of options for player and Dungeon Master alike. This 248-page book includes:
• 6 subclasses. Explore the Maverick Artificer, the Circle of the Forge Druid, the Living Weapon Monk, and more! • 10 species and 2 backgrounds that allow you to create adventurers from across Eberron. • 12 feats that support the species introduced in this book as well as the iconic species of Eberron. • 4 spells and over 40 magic items that dig deeper into the weapons of the Last War, the symbionts of the Daelkyr, and the tools of the Dragonmarked Houses! • 8 monsters, including powerful Archfey and a dreadful Daelkyr!
All content has been updated and is fully compatible with the current edition of Dungeons & Dragons!
